Tu refugio en la ciudad
Arriendo de casas amobladas inmersas en la naturaleza con vistas a la cordillera y al valle de la Dehesa.
Pueblo was born from the idea of ​​returning to the essentials.
A place designed for walking among parks and walkways, gazing at the mountain range, meeting others, and letting nature set the rhythm of the day.
Here, every experience feels simple and authentic.
Immersion in nature
The mountain range is not a landscape: it is our inspiration.
Close to everything, enveloped in silence
Safety and trust
Your well-being is our priority
Flexible and commitment-free rental
Freedom to live at your own pace
Community life
We believe in the value of sharing
A place to stay as long as you need
Rental of furnished houses integrated into the landscape, with natural light and views of the mountain range.

In every town, there's a place where paths cross and stories begin.  La Casita is that place - a warm sunlit haven nestled into the landscape, where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee mingles with the quiet hum of creativity and conversation.
Whether you're seeking a peaceful corner to work, a table to share with friends, or a spontaneous encounter with a neighbor, La Casita welcomes you.
With an attentive team, flexible rental and a prime location — close to everything, yet enveloped in silence — Pueblo offers a simple, connected and peaceful way of living from day one.
Spaces to stay
Each house offers a different experience, united by light, design and the calm of the surroundings.
2 BEDROOMS / 2.5 BATHROOMS
Two levels and double height, designed to live with greater spaciousness and privacy between environments.
2 BEDROOMS / 2 BATHROOMS
A first floor that opens onto the park, with the terrace as a natural extension of the house.
A second floor with open views of the mountain range and a greater sense of perspective.
1 BEDROOM / 1.5 BATHROOMS
A bedroom, with the greatest interior space and a more open and prominent experience.
Flexible stays
Book now for our short, medium and long term stays.
Experiences that bring Pueblo to life

In addition to enjoying Pueblo, we organize experiences in three worlds —nature, pause and community— that originate in Pueblo and expand to its surroundings: from walks, yoga classes, to explorations that connect the mountain range, the ski resorts and the coast.
The village life we ​​seek today, with nature and calm, without leaving the city
We're here to help.
If you would like more details or wish to schedule a visit, please get in touch with us.

Availability
Perfect for up to 4 guests.
2 bedrooms · 2.5 bathrooms
73 m² interior · 16 m² terrace

The house is distributed over two floors, where the double-height ceiling provides light and a sense of spaciousness. On the second level, one of the bedrooms opens onto the living room, creating a continuous visual connection and a more open and dynamic way of living.
The terrace adds a comfortable outdoor space to complement the rhythm of the day.
Designed for those seeking height, light, and a more fluid spatial experience.
Everything you need, without having to worry about anything.
100% furnished and equipped houses (living room, dining room, bedrooms, full kitchen, bathrooms)

Smoking is not allowed inside the houses, in order to maintain a clean and cared-for environment.
Pueblo maintains a pet-free environment to ensure everyone's experience is enjoyable.

Its layout is simple, bright, and functional.
Ideal for those who value living at park level and enjoying greenery as part of everyday life.

Services to accompany your stay
Staying in Pueblo is more than having a unique space: it's about accessing services and experiences that connect with the environment.
From everyday life to walks and tourist experiences, everything is designed to help you live more calmly and make better use of your time.
Helicopter tours
Different ways of inhabiting the essential
Choose between our short, medium or long term stays and our 4 types of houses.
The story behind Pueblo
Inspired by village life, nature and tranquility.
What if slowing down didn't mean leaving the city?
Today we live surrounded by noise, traffic, and haste. But we all seek, consciously or unconsciously, a place where that pace can change. That's where Pueblo begins.
“Propusimos una arquitectura elevada... para que el lugar, la luz y la cordillera dialoguen”
Martin Lira
- arquitecto
Volver a lo esencial
Pueblo nace de una idea simple y poderosa:
crear un lugar donde la vida se sienta calma y con propósito.
Imaginamos una forma de vivir más simple,
inspirada en la vida de pueblo.
Caminar sin apuro.
Mirar y sentir la cordillera.
Dejar que el entorno acompañe.
“Elegimos especies nativas y flores, diseñando un verde que se recorre, se vive y se cuida, acompañado por la cordillera”
Inés Couve -
Nuestra inspiración
La vida de pueblo
Los encuentros espontáneos, los gestos cotidianos, el centro que reúne.
La naturaleza como escenario
Parques de árboles nativos, pasarelas y la cordillera siempre presente.
Un ritmo más tranquilo
Días pensados para caminar, encontrarse y vivir sin apuro.
El diseño bien pensado
Espacios simples, honestos y cuidados, que se integran al entorno y a la vida diaria.
“Pensamos interiores cálidos, nobles y simples. Espacios que se sienten bien y dan ganas de habitar”
Juan Ignacio Court -
interiorista
“Acompañamos cada estadía con atención y cariño, para que desde el primer día se sientan en casa”
Maureen Morrison - Experiencia Pueblo
Your refuge in the city
EXPERIENCES IN THE VILLAGE OF LA DEHESA
More than a place
A way to live experiences every day
At Pueblo, we believe the life of a place doesn’t simply happen on its own.

That’s why, beyond the everyday moments that naturally emerge from the surroundings, we curate and activate experiences that connect people with nature, wellbeing, and community life. Everything comes together across three worlds that coexist and intertwine each day.
Nature: Explore your surroundings
Walking through the park, strolling along the walkways, or going out to clear your head is part of daily life in Pueblo.
In addition, we organize outdoor experiences to go further: guided walks, trekking, helicopter rides and outings that connect the mountain range, the ski resorts and the coast.
Pause: Connect with yourself
In Pueblo, slowing down is also part of the experience. Reading, contemplating the landscape, or simply being happens naturally.
We complement that pause with wellness activities that we activate from Pueblo: Yoga classes, meditation, relaxation and workshops that help to reconnect with oneself and with the moment.
Community: Share with others
Pueblo's life is built on everyday encounters: morning coffee, something delicious to eat, conversations in the park, shared moments.
From La Casita, we promote experiences and encounters that strengthen the community: cultural activations, exhibitions and collaborations with brands with purpose.
THE LITTLE HOUSE
Your refuge in Pueblo
As in every town, there is a place to meet.
In Pueblo, that place is La Casita.
An exclusive space for our guests, where coffee, delicious food, and everyday encounters bring life to daily life and complete the Pueblo experience.
A meeting place
Exclusive for our guests
Moments at La Casita
Discover its hidden corners, flavors, and the warmth that makes it unique.
*Images for reference only
Small moments that make the everyday special...
A hot cup, a conversation, a cozy place.
Close to everything, in a quiet environment
Pueblo La Dehesa is located in a residential area of La Dehesa, with excellent connectivity and a privileged natural environment.
Its location allows you to be close to the main access points, services and facilities of the sector, without sacrificing silence, views and the feeling of living surrounded by nature.

Terms and Conditions
General Provisions

This document sets forth the Terms and Conditions governing access to and use of the website http://www.puebloladehesa.cl (hereinafter, the “Site” or the “Website”), which is owned by OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA, represented for these purposes by Mr./Ms. José Joaquín Perez Adriasola, ID No. 6.334.221-1, domiciled at Avenida Vitacura No. 4380, 15th floor, Vitacura, Metropolitan Region, Chile.
We recommend that you carefully read these Terms and Conditions for your information.

These Terms and Conditions shall apply to any person who accesses the Website (the “User”) and shall be deemed incorporated into each of the agreements entered into (the “Client”) with OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA (hereinafter “PUEBLO SpA”) through this Website.

The use of this Website, the application of these Terms and Conditions, and any acts or agreements executed through this Website are subject to the laws of the Republic of Chile, especially Law No. 19.496 on Consumer Protection and Law No. 19.628 on Personal Data Protection. Accordingly, PUEBLO SpA shall strictly comply with all benefits, guarantees, and/or rights established by these laws for transactions carried out through the Site.
Freedom of Navigation and Acceptance of Terms and Conditions

To use the Site, the User must have a secure and stable broadband Internet connection between the User’s access device and the Site. Without prejudice to the foregoing, the User is responsible for having the technological means necessary for proper visualization and operation of the Site, such as a stable Internet connection and an updated browser.

Access to the Site is free of charge for the User or Client, as is the use of software and mobile applications to visit, compare, and purchase the services offered. Merely visiting the Site does not impose any obligation, unless the User and/or Client has unequivocally expressed, through positive actions, their intention to acquire certain services, as indicated in these Terms and Conditions.

Express acceptance of these Terms and Conditions will be required before making any payment through the Site’s booking engine. For this purpose, the User must click on an enabled checkbox with the phrase “I have read and accept the Terms and Conditions” (or equivalent), which shall constitute valid, free, informed, and unequivocal consent by the User regarding their acceptance.
How to Contract Services
To make purchases on this Site, you must follow the steps below by completing the required fields and clicking the corresponding buttons:
Enter the period for which you wish to make a reservation and the number of guests.
From the displayed alternatives, select the most suitable unit.
Enter your name and contact details, including email address.
Choose a payment method and accept the Terms and Conditions.
Complete the payment through the selected platform.

Once the payment has been completed, the description of the selected services will be displayed on screen, including check-in and check-out dates, unit type, price, payment method, total transaction value, purchase conditions, and a unique booking code. This same information will be sent to the registered email address.
The processing of Personal Data provided during the service contracting process shall be carried out in accordance with Law No. 19.628 and our Privacy Policy (ADD HYPERLINK).
Payment Methods

Unless otherwise indicated for specific cases or promotions, the products and services offered on this Site may be paid through the WebPay Plus, MercadoPago, and PayPal payment platforms using the following payment methods:
Bank credit cards: Visa, Mastercard, Diners Club International, or American Express.
Bank debit cards under the Redcompra system, issued by Chilean banks.
Bank transfer, when expressly indicated.

Users acknowledge that these payment platforms and payment methods belong to third-party service providers independent from and not related to PUEBLO SpA., therefore, the continuity of their services and the proper functioning of their online payment tools and buttons shall be the sole responsibility of such companies.

If, for any reason, a transaction is canceled and payment has been made through any of these methods, the refund shall be subject to the conditions established by the bank, financial institution, or issuer of the corresponding credit or debit card contracted by the Client and used for payment. All aspects related to the use of these credit or debit cards, such as issuance date, expiration, credit limits, blocks, and others not mentioned herein, shall be governed, in relation to the issuing or operating company, by the respective Account Agreement and Terms of Use, which shall prevail in case of contradiction.
The Site may, when applicable, inform special or exclusive offers associated with one or more payment methods.
Cancellation and Modification Policies
Any modification or cancellation must be requested in writing via email to contacto@puebloladehesa.cl, indicating the reservation holder’s name and booking code.
High Season
Modification:
Up to 15 days before arrival date: free of charge, subject to availability.
Cancellation:
Up to 15 days before arrival date: 100% refund of the total reservation amount.
From 14 days before arrival date until arrival date: 100% charge of the total reservation amount.
In cases of force majeure, the conditions shall be as follows:
50% refund of the total reservation amount.
Force majeure includes natural disasters, epidemics, quarantines, border closures, civil conflicts, or other similar causes beyond the control of PUEBLO SpA that make service provision impossible.
, 100% of the total reserved stay will be charged.
Other Conditions for Reservation Modifications
If the modification includes dates with different rates, there may be a price difference to be paid.
Existing reservations cannot be canceled to issue new reservations with promotional rates.
Reservations may only be modified once. Upon modification, the original reservation policies shall remain in force.
Under no circumstances shall PUEBLO SpA be liable for:
Improper use of materials displayed on the Site by users or visitors.
Damages arising from technical failures, website errors, or service interruptions.
Content from external websites linked to the Site.
Loss, misuse, or unauthorized use of reservation validation codes.
PUEBLO SpA does not guarantee permanent availability or continuity of the Website’s operation.
The total contractual or legal liability of PUEBLO SpA shall in no case exceed the amount effectively paid by the User for the corresponding reservation.
Data Security

PUEBLO SpA shall adopt the necessary and prudent measures to safeguard the security of Users’ and/or Clients’ personal data through encryption systems and security certificates. The Site uses HTTPS, HSTS, TLS protocols, SSL certificates, among others, which provide greater security in information processing and website navigation.

Personal data voluntarily provided by the User shall become part of a PUEBLO SpA database and may only be processed by PUEBLO SpA for the automatic completion of documents, receipts, or transaction-related records, operation of payment methods available on the Site, reservation management, communications, handling inquiries, and other actions necessary for proper service provision. Such data shall not be shared with third parties except where permitted by law.
Without prejudice to the foregoing, users shall be responsible for the loss, misuse, or unauthorized use of their validation information.
Personal Data
Users guarantee that the information provided is truthful, complete, and up to date.

The Client or User may revoke authorization for the processing of personal data and shall always have ARCO rights (access, rectification, cancellation, opposition, deletion, and portability) in accordance with Law No. 19.628 on Personal Data Protection. To exercise these rights, revoke authorization, or modify personal information registered on the Site, the User must send an email to contacto@puebloladehesa.cl. PUEBLO SpA must respond within a maximum period of 30 calendar days.
For more information about the processing of Personal Data and PUEBLO SpA’s Privacy Policy, Users may consult the relevant document directly on the Website.
Electronic Documents

The User expressly authorizes OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA, Tax ID No. 78.331.527-0, to issue tax documents derived from this transaction exclusively by electronic means, in accordance with regulations issued by the Chilean Internal Revenue Service (SII).
Scope of the Stated Conditions

PUEBLO SpA shall not modify the conditions under which services were contracted while they remain published on the Website. Prices indicated on the Site shall apply fully to service contracts made through this channel, even if they differ from those offered through other PUEBLO SpA sales channels such as catalogs, television, radio, email, or others.

Any changes in prices, conditions, promotions, or offers published on the Site shall apply only to future transactions and shall be informed prior to contracting the service, without affecting consumers’ acquired rights under Law No. 19.496.

PUEBLO SpA strictly complies with the right established in Article 3, letter b) of Law No. 19.496, regarding the provision of truthful and timely information about offered services, their price, contracting conditions, and other relevant characteristics.
Intellectual Property

All content included on this Site, such as text, graphic material, logos, button icons, source codes, images, audio clips, digital downloads, and data compilations, is the property of PUEBLO SpA or its content providers and is protected by Chilean and international intellectual property laws.
Total or partial reproduction without prior written authorization from PUEBLO SpA is prohibited, without prejudice to exceptions expressly established by law.
Communications

All promotional communications sent electronically by PUEBLO SpA, with the prior express consent of the User and/or Client, shall clearly identify their advertising nature, indicate the sender’s identity, and provide an easy mechanism allowing recipients to request suspension of such communications, in accordance with Article 28 B of Law No. 19.496. Upon such request, PUEBLO SpA shall immediately cease sending new communications.
Any communication, inquiry, or complaint must be sent to contacto@puebloladehesa.cl.

PRIVACY POLICY
This Privacy Policy is deemed to form part of the Terms and Conditions of contracting with
OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA

through its website www.puebloladehesa.cl and, in general, forms an integral part of any type of relationship maintained with it. Should you wish to resolve any questions or submit any observations regarding this Privacy Policy, you may contact us at contacto@puebloladehesa.cl.
1. Data Controller
In accordance with the regulations in force on the protection of personal data, it is hereby established that the data controller shall be
, Tax ID No. 78.331.529-7, with registered address at Santa Blanca No. 550, Lo Barnechea district, city of Santiago, Chile.
2. Purposes of Data Processing

Personal data shall be used for purposes strictly related to the management of the Company’s commercial and contractual relationships, including, but not limited to, transaction management, preparation of statistics, sending commercial, legal and security-related communications, satisfaction surveys, and conducting operational or market analyses.

Additionally, if the corresponding acceptance checkbox has been selected during any transaction with OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA through the website—including the contracting or quotation of services, participation in offers or promotions—such data may be used to carry out advertising/marketing campaigns and market research, together with statistical, commercial or other related data.
3. Legal Basis

Personal data shall be processed exclusively when there is a valid legal basis enabling such processing, such as compliance with legal obligations, execution of contractual relationships, consent granted by the data subject, or the legitimate interest of the controller, provided that fundamental rights are not infringed.
4. Data Transfers and Data Processing by Third Parties

OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA may disclose personal data to suppliers or third parties acting as data processors, exclusively for the fulfillment of specific, determined and legitimate purposes, under contractual conditions that guarantee the confidentiality, integrity and security of the information, as well as its use solely within the scope of the entrusted purpose.

The transfer of data to such data processors shall be carried out pursuant to duly valid executed service contracts, under which such third parties shall be obliged to process the data exclusively in accordance with the instructions received, refraining from any additional or unauthorized processing not expressly permitted by OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA.

Where necessary, data transfers shall be carried out through secure mechanisms, such as encryption, pseudonymization or masking techniques, ensuring that the information can only be accessed by authorized recipients in their capacity as data controllers or processors.
OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA shall not carry out international transfers of personal data, unless required by a legal obligation or where the data subject has granted prior, express and informed consent.

The data subject may, at any time, exercise the right to object to the disclosure of their personal data to third-party data processors, through the contact channels enabled for this purpose, specifically via the email
contacto@puebloladehesa.cl.

In the event that a legal obligation or liability arises from the processing of personal data, OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA may make such information available to the competent administrative, judicial or regulatory authority, in accordance with the legislation in force at the time of the corresponding transfer or management.
5. Data Retention Period

Personal data shall be retained only for the period strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes that justified its collection and processing, or for the period required by applicable legal provisions, as appropriate.

In cases where the legal basis for processing is the consent granted by the data subject, the data may be retained indefinitely, unless such consent is revoked through the exercise of the right to cancellation, in accordance with Law No. 19.628 on the Protection of Private Life.

Once the right to cancellation has been exercised, the personal data shall be blocked and processing suspended, without prejudice to their retention where strictly necessary to comply with legal obligations or where liability of a judicial, legal or contractual nature may arise. In such cases, the data may only be accessed for the purpose of addressing such requirements, in accordance with applicable regulations.
6. Means of Collection of Personal Data
OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA may collect personal data through various means, either directly from the data subject or through automated processes, in accordance with applicable regulations.
a) Information provided directly

Personal data may be collected through forms, emails, telephone interactions, registrations on digital platforms or during the execution of contracts. Such information may include, among others, full name, address, national identification number (RUT), date of birth, email address, telephone number and payment details. In certain cases, data relating to personal characteristics, employment background or economic situation may also be collected.
b) Automatically collected information

While browsing our digital channels, technical data relating to the device and site usage may be collected, such as IP address, browser, operating system, date and time of access, and browsing behavior. This information allows us to analyze site performance, prevent fraud and improve user experience.
c) Data provided by third parties

The contracting of certain services may require the processing of third-party data. In such cases, the client must have obtained the prior and informed consent of such third parties and shall be responsible for informing them of the purposes and conditions of the processing.
d) Information obtained from social networks or third-party sites

Publicly available information from social networks or other sources may be accessed when relevant and in accordance with their respective privacy policies. Likewise, when accessing external sites through links, the processing of personal data shall be governed by the third party’s policies, without liability for OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA.
f) Public access sources and other lawful origins
The Company may obtain personal data through public access sources, legally acquired databases or inquiries to authorized third parties, always in accordance with applicable regulations.
7. Use of Cookies
Cookies are used to optimize the website experience and obtain usage statistics.

Cookies are text files containing small amounts of information that are downloaded and stored on the user’s device (computer, mobile phone, tablet, etc.) when accessing certain websites. Cookies allow a website to recognize the user’s device and collect information about browsing activity for statistical, functional or advertising purposes.

The use of cookies ensures the technical operability of the website and provides a more efficient, secure and personalized browsing experience, contributing to the continuous improvement of the services offered by OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA.

Disabling cookies, either fully or partially, may affect the normal operation of the website and limit access to certain features or services. In such cases, only cookies strictly necessary for the basic functioning of the site will remain enabled.
Users may configure their browser at any time to partially or fully disable cookies, in accordance with the instructions provided by each browser software provider.
8. Protection of Personal Data

OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA declares its full commitment to the protection and safeguarding of the personal data of users who access and use its website. To this end, it ensures strict compliance with applicable data protection regulations, complemented by internal policies aimed at periodically reviewing regulatory compliance, as well as the technical and organizational measures adopted to preserve information security.

With regard to data related to payment methods, such as bank cards, OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA has implemented technological systems that allow for the encryption and encoding of such information, in order to minimize the risk of unauthorized access or fraudulent use. Notwithstanding the foregoing, absolute invulnerability cannot be guaranteed; therefore, users are advised to refrain from sending sensitive information—such as credit or debit card details—without encryption, or from public or unsecured devices or connections.

Users are also reminded that the protection of access credentials, devices or any other personal authentication mechanism is the sole responsibility of the user, who must adopt the necessary safeguards to prevent unauthorized access to their account or information.

The data subject may exercise, at any time, the rights granted under applicable legislation, in particular the rights of access, rectification, cancellation, objection, deletion and portability (known as “ARCO Rights”), by submitting a request to
. Upon the exercise of any of these rights, OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA shall cease processing the relevant data and proceed with its deletion or anonymization.

Notwithstanding the above, data may be retained in a blocked state where such retention is necessary to comply with legal obligations or for the exercise, defense or potential enforcement of judicial, legal or contractual claims. In such cases, access to the information shall be strictly limited to the aforementioned purposes and only enabled where legally justified.
9. Suspension of Promotional or Advertising Communications
The data subject may, at any time, request the suspension of promotional or advertising communications, in accordance with Law No. 19.496 on the Protection of Consumer Rights.

For this purpose, users may use the unsubscribe mechanisms included in each message or exercise this right through the channels enabled by OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA or those provided by the National Consumer Service (SERNAC). Additionally, such request may be submitted in writing via email to
10. Amendments to this Policy
OPERADORA PUEBLO SpA may amend this Privacy Policy at any time. Any modification shall be communicated on the website and/or through the contact channels registered by the User.
Furnished Apartment Rental
Furnished apartments
Furnished houses immersed in nature with views of the mountain range and the Dehesa valley.
Furnished Apartment for Rent: Discover Pueblo La Dehesa
Your needs are our priority

There are many reasons why you might be looking to rent a furnished apartment. A major home renovation, a temporary change in your life or career, or simply figuring out what you want for the next stage of your life.

We're here to provide flexible and comfortable solutions for your needs. We offer fully equipped units, daily or weekly cleaning service, and breakfast options. These will depend on the length of your stay and your specific requirements. Contact us to learn more about Pueblo La Dehesa.
What makes us different?
We're prepared for your situation, whether it's a short-term rental for a couple of days or something longer. We adapt to you.
But we not only have the infrastructure for you to experience this transition period, we have also established systems to make Pueblo La Dehesa a community.
Discover our activities and experiences, and become part of this new way of living in the city.
A pause, a refuge from your daily life.
A place to live experiences
Yoga classes, afternoon trekking. Workshops, social gatherings, and much more. All just steps from your unit. This is part of what makes us unique.
Close to everything, yet shrouded in silence.
If you have to live in the city for logistical reasons, but want to disconnect when work is over: come and discover Pueblo La Dehesa.
Experience nature, tranquility, and the warmth of a small community, without straying from the accessibility that Santiago offers.
Seasonal Rental
Flexible Seasonal Rentals
We adapt to your needs
Seasonal Rentals: Flexibility in Pueblo La Dehesa
We have furnished houses that will allow you to spend as much time as you need.
A work period?
If you don't live in Santiago but need to spend some time there for a project or a special work situation, we have the solution to your needs.

Pueblo La Dehesa is the ideal place because, in addition to offering flexible accommodations, it allows you to take a break after your workday. It's a space to disconnect amidst nature and a welcoming community.
You're not just coming to work, but to live a different experience.
Do you need an extended remodel?
If you're redesigning your kitchen or bathrooms, it can be very unpleasant to stay in your usual home.
We present an opportunity to disconnect from the stress of having construction work at home: people constantly working, noise, and lack of privacy.
Discover Pueblo La Dehesa and create a break from your daily routine.
You can also add cleaning service and breakfast. Make this experience a well-deserved break from your routine.
Does the move-out date of your current home not match the delivery date of your next location?
Don't overcomplicate things! Pueblo La Dehesa is a flexible alternative.

Nos adaptamos a tus necesidades
Flexibilidad en Pueblo La Dehesa

Hay ocasiones en que necesitamos un espacio listo para una estadía temporal. Un viaje de trabajo, un proyecto que te retiene en Santiago, la espera de un departamento o una remodelación en tu próximo hogar.
Queremos ofrecerte una solución a tu experiencia, con un nuevo nivel de privacidad y tranquilidad que no te ofrecerá un hotel.
En Pueblo La Dehesa queremos presentarte una alternativa de paz y calma. Nos incorporamos a tu estilo de vida, pero dando un valor agregado a tus tardes, noches y fines de semana.
¿Qué servicios y experiencias ofrecemos?
Con unidades 100% equipadas, no te faltará nada.
Nuestro servicio de limpieza se ofrece diaria o semanalmente (dependiendo del largo de tu estadía).
Ofrecemos opciones con desayuno incluido.

Y tenemos un calendario de experiencias de las que te puedes hacer parte, en donde construimos la comunidad de Pueblo La Dehesa: Clases de Yoga, Meditación, Salidas de Trekking, experiencias culturales y mucho más.
Todo lo que necesitas, en un solo lugar.
